description_long: This is a two-story brick house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a prominent front entryway with double doors and a paved approach. The exterior walls are clad in reddish-brown brick, and the windows are arranged in symmetrical rows with black frames. Attached to the right side of the house is a large, single-story garage with a flat, dark roof and matching brickwork. The property is enclosed by a light-colored fence, and there are two distinct yard areas: a paved driveway and a green lawn. The roof of the main house is flat, and the overall design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description: A two-story brick house with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, and an attached garage, surrounded by a fence and featuring both paved and grassy yard areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with double doors, paved driveway, and attached garage to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large green lawn, the back of the garage, and the symmetrical window arrangement on the house.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the expanse of the lawn, the side of the garage, and the flat roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the paved area in front of the garage and the side entry or overhang feature.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a paved approach, flanked by stone columns and minimal overhang.
